gist.headline: One API to rule them all
gist.blurb: Gratisfy just landed in the apps showcase. It wrangles all the free AI inference providers—including us—into one unified API. Less hunting for endpoints, more building.
gist.summary: Added Gratisfy to the community apps showcase, a unified hub and API for discovering and accessing free AI inference providers.
gist.impact: Developers can now access Pollinations alongside other free AI providers through Gratisfy's single unified API endpoint.
gist.visual_concept: Gratisfy unifies free AI providers. Visual metaphor: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot gathering various glowing API nodes (representing different providers) into one central, glowing lime green hub. A sense of bringing things together.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot gathering various glowing, colorful API nodes into one central, glowing lime green (#ecf874) hub. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
